result.finding: The application uses the Spring Boot default HTTP port 8080. No explicit server.port property is set in application.properties, so Spring Boot defaults to port 8080. No Dockerfile, docker-compose, or Kubernetes manifests define port mappings.
evidence: No server.port property found in application.properties or application-mysql.properties
No Dockerfile EXPOSE instruction (no Dockerfile present)
No docker-compose ports configuration (no docker-compose.yml present)
No Kubernetes containerPort configuration (no K8s manifests present)
Spring Boot default port is 8080 when server.port is not specified
